keywordGapSubtitle: Find keywords your competitors rank for that you don't
keywordGapNoCompetitorsHint: Add competitors to discover keyword opportunities
keywordGapSelectPrompt: Select a competitor to view keyword gaps
keywordGapBulkActions: Bulk actions will be available soon
overlapEmpty: Add competitors and monitor keywords to see overlap data
tooltipPriorityDesc: Overall priority based on opportunity score and search volume
tooltipScoreDesc: Opportunity score (0-100) combining volume, difficulty, and competitor position
tooltipEstTrafficDesc: Estimated monthly traffic you could capture by ranking for this keyword
tooltipDifficultyDesc: How hard it is to rank for this keyword (0-100)
reportTooltipKeywordDesc: The keyword phrase analyzed in the report
reportTooltipStatusDesc: Current processing status of the report
reportTooltipAvgPosDesc: Average SERP position across top results
reportTooltipTopUrlDesc: The highest ranking URL for this keyword
contentAnalysisSubtitle: Compare on-page SEO metrics with competitor pages
removeCompetitorConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this competitor? It will be hidden from tracking.
removeCompetitorsConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {count} competitor(s)?
contentGapSectionSubtitle: Identify keyword opportunities where competitors rank but you don't
contentGapSectionTooltip: Content gap analysis compares your keyword rankings with competitors to find opportunities you're missing.
competitorOverviewNoCompetitorsHint: Add competitors to compare rankings over time
competitorOverviewNoDataHint: Check competitor positions to populate the chart
gapTrendsEmpty: No trend data yet. Run content gap analysis to start tracking.
addCompetitorSubtitle: Discover competitors from your data or add one manually
addCompetitorSerpDesc: Domains that rank for your monitored keywords.
addCompetitorSerpEmpty: No competitors found in SERP data yet
addCompetitorSerpEmptyHint: Monitor more keywords to discover competitors
addCompetitorSuggestDesc: Domains that compete for the same organic keywords as you.
addCompetitorManualDesc: Enter a competitor domain to add it directly.
addCompetitorManualDomainNote: Enter the domain without http:// or www.
contentGapDetailScoreBreakdownDesc: The opportunity score (0-100) is calculated from three factors: search volume potential, keyword difficulty, and competitor ranking position.
contentGapDetailVolumeDesc: Based on {volume} monthly searches. Higher volume = more points (up to 50).
contentGapDetailDifficultyDesc: Difficulty is {difficulty}/100 ({label}). Lower difficulty = more points.
contentGapDetailWhoRanksDesc: Shows which competitor currently ranks for this keyword, their position, and the specific URL that ranks.
contentGapDetailNoRankingDesc: You currently have no ranking for this keyword. This is a pure content gap — creating a dedicated page could capture this traffic.
contentGapDetailWhatToDoDesc: Actionable recommendations based on keyword difficulty, search volume, competitor position, and your current ranking status.
recEasyWinDesc: Low difficulty keyword — create a well-optimized page targeting this phrase. With quality content and basic on-page SEO, you can rank relatively quickly.
recModerateEffortDesc: Medium difficulty — build comprehensive, in-depth content with strong internal linking. Consider creating a pillar page covering this topic thoroughly.
recHighCompetitionDesc: Difficult keyword — build topical authority first by targeting related easier keywords. Then create pillar content backed by quality backlinks.
recHighValueTargetDesc: Your competitor ranks in the top 3 for this high-volume keyword. Study their content structure, word count, and backlink profile to create something better.
recSignificantTrafficDesc: High search volume keyword. Even ranking in positions 5-10 could drive substantial organic traffic to your site.
recCreateNewContentDesc: You have no rankings for this keyword yet. Create a dedicated, optimized page targeting this specific topic and search intent.
recImproveExistingDesc: You currently rank at position {position}. Update and improve your existing page — add more depth, better structure, and relevant internal links.
recQuickContentPieceDesc: Low volume but very easy to rank for. Good for building topical coverage and internal linking structure.
generateReportConfirmation: This will run all analyses and collect data into a downloadable PDF:
generateReportStepBacklinks: Run competitor backlink analysis (if data is stale)
generateReportStepCollect: Collect all metrics into a downloadable PDF
generateReportFreshDataNote: Fresh data (less than 24h old) will be reused. This may take a few minutes.
gapSummaryTotalGapsTooltip: Total keywords where at least one competitor ranks but you don't. More gaps = more untapped opportunities.
gapSummaryHighPriorityTooltip: Gaps scored 70+ out of 100, indicating high search volume, low difficulty, or competitor ranking in top positions. Best opportunities to pursue first.
gapSummaryEstTrafficTooltip: Estimated monthly visits you could gain by ranking for all gap keywords. Calculated assuming ~30% click-through rate for top positions.
gapSummaryCompetitorsTooltip: Number of unique competitor domains analyzed in the content gap comparison.
gapComparisonTooltip: Compares how many content gaps each competitor contributes. Competitors with many high-priority gaps likely target topics you are missing entirely.
overlapSummary: {totalKeywords} keywords across {competitorCount} competitor(s) · You rank for {youRanking}
overlapNoMatchHint: Try adjusting your search or filters.
contentGapNoCompetitorsHint: Add competitors to discover content gap opportunities
contentGapDescription: Keywords where competitors rank but you don't. Higher scores indicate easier wins with more traffic potential.
contentGapNoOpportunitiesHint: Run content gap analysis to find opportunities
tooltipKeywordDesc: The search phrase that represents this content gap opportunity.
tooltipCompetitorDesc: The competitor domain that currently ranks for this keyword.
tooltipScoreFullDesc: Weighted score (0-100): search volume (up to 50pts) + difficulty bonus (up to 50pts) + position bonus (+20 for top 3, +10 for top 10). Higher is better.
tooltipVolumeDesc: Average monthly search volume for this keyword. Higher volume means more potential traffic.
tooltipDifficultyFullDesc: Keyword difficulty score (0-100). Lower values indicate easier keywords to rank for. Based on backlink profiles of current top results.
tooltipCompPosDesc: The position where the competitor currently ranks for this keyword in search results.
tooltipStatusFullDesc: Identified = newly found, Monitoring = being tracked, Ranking = you now rank, Dismissed = not relevant.
tooltipPriorityFullDesc: Automatically assigned based on opportunity score: High (70+), Medium (40-69), Low (below 40).
reportsEmptyDesc: Create reports from keyword monitoring to analyze competitor content strategies and get actionable recommendations.
reportsTooltipKeyword: The target keyword this analysis was created for
reportsTooltipCompetitors: Number of competitor pages analyzed for this keyword
reportsTooltipAvgWords: Average word count across analyzed competitor pages
reportsTooltipAvgH2: Average number of H2 headings used by competitor pages
reportsTooltipAvgImages: Average number of images used by competitor pages
contentAnalysisNoCompetitorsHint: Add competitors above to analyze their page content
contentAnalysisNoDataHint: Click "Analyze Page" to fetch competitor page analysis
contentAnalysisSelectPrompt: Select a competitor and keyword to view content analysis
contentAnalysisNotRanking: Not ranking or no analysis available
contentAnalysisInsightWordsAdd: Consider adding {count} more words to match competitor depth
contentAnalysisInsightH2Add: Add {count} more H2 headings for better structure
contentAnalysisPageAnalysisStarted: Page analysis started — results will appear shortly
recIncreaseContentDesc: Competitors average {avgWords} words. {gap, select, positive {Add ~{gapWords} more words.} other {Your content is shorter.}}
recIncreaseContentStep1: Expand existing sections with more detail
recImproveHeadingsDesc: Competitors use an average of {count} H2 headings. Add more section headings.
recImproveHeadingsStep1: Break content into clear sections with H2 tags
recAddImagesDesc: Competitors use an average of {count} images. Visual content improves engagement.
recAddImagesStep1: Add relevant images to each section
recAddImagesStep2: Use alt text with target keywords
recBuildBacklinksDesc: Analyze where competitors get their backlinks and target similar sources.
recBuildBacklinksStep1: Review competitor backlink sources in report
recBuildBacklinksStep2: Reach out to top referring domains
createReportSelectHint: Select 1-3 competitors from SERP to analyze what makes them rank well
createReportFetchSerpFirst: Fetch SERP data for this keyword first
clickToDiscoverCompetitors: Click below to discover your organic search competitors
positionScatterDescription: Your position vs competitor position per keyword. Points below the diagonal = you rank better.
backlinkRadarDescription: Normalized backlink metrics comparison across your domain and competitors (0-100 scale).
backlinkQualityDescription: Backlinks grouped by referring domain rank tier (DR).
keywordBarsDescription: Position comparison for your highest-volume keywords. Lower position number = better ranking.
contentGapBubbleDescription: Gap keywords plotted by difficulty vs search volume. Bubble size = competitors ranking. Color = opportunity score.
